title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Supporting Actor Prediction
text: Based on Variety's predictions for the 2026 Golden Globes, Stellan Skarsgård is favored to win Best Supporting Actor for his role in Sentimental Value (Neon). The article notes that Skarsgård faces potential competition from two other contenders: Benicio Del Toro, who appears in One Battle After Another, and Jacob Elordi from Frankenstein. The prediction reflects the strong performance of Sentimental Value across multiple categories at the 83rd Golden Globes ceremony, where the film is positioned as a significant contender in several races beyond acting awards. Skarsgård's performance in the Norwegian film marks a strong recognition of his work in a smaller international production.
